# Template DEFINE specs

One spec per template (PROMPT.md §5). Reference implementations:

- [resume_fluvo_08-berlin.md](./resume_fluvo_08-berlin.md) — bands / engineering
- [resume_fluvo_09-manhattan.md](./resume_fluvo_09-manhattan.md) — banner / executive
- [resume_fluvo_10-sydney.md](./resume_fluvo_10-sydney.md) — **invoice_fluvo_10 structure** (sidebar + table)

Validate all 20: `npm run test:resume-checklist`
